debug_info.goal:
u v : ℕ
S : Set ℕ
h₀ : ∀ (n : ℕ), n ∈ S ↔ 0 < n ∧ 14 * n % 100 = 46
h₁ : IsLeast S u
h₂ : IsLeast (S \ {u}) v
⊢ (↑u + ↑v) / 2 = 64

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using this
  have hu_lt : u < v := lt_of_le_of_ne hu_le (Ne.symm hv_ne)

  have hmod : ∀ n : ℕ, 14 * n % 100 = 46 ↔ n % 50 = 39 := by
    intro n
    constructor
    · intro hn
      have : (14 * (n % 50)) % 100 = 46 := by
        simpa [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.mod_mod] using hn
      have hlt : n % 50 < 50 := Nat.mod_lt n (by decide : 0 < 50)
      have hlt' : 14 * (n % 50) < 700 := by
        have : 14 * (n % 50) ≤ 14 * 49 := by
          exact Nat.mul_le_mul_left 14 (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (by simpa using hlt))
        exact lt_of_le_of_lt this (by decide : 14 * 49 < 700)
      have : 14 * (n % 50) = 46 ∨ 14 * (n % 50) = 146 ∨ 14 * (n % 50) = 246 ∨
          14 * (n % 50) = 346 ∨ 14 * (n % 50) = 446 ∨ 14 * (n % 50) = 546 ∨
          14 * (n % 50) = 646 := by
        have h : 14 * (n % 50) % 100 = 46 := this
        have hm : 14 * (n % 50) < 700 := hlt'
        have : ∃ k : ℕ, k < 7 ∧ 14 * (n % 50) = 46 + 100 * k := by
          refine ⟨(14 * (n % 50)) / 100, ?_, ?_⟩
          ·
            have : (14 * (n % 50)) / 100 < 700 / 100 := Nat.div_lt_div_of_lt (by decide : 0 < 100) hm
            simpa using this
          ·
            have := Nat.mod_add_div (14 * (n % 50)) 100
            -- (a % m) + m * (a / m) = a
            -- rewrite mod as 46
            simpa [h, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm,
              Nat.mul_assoc] using this.symm
        rcases this with ⟨k, hklt, hk⟩
        fin_cases k <;> simp [hklt] at hk <;> subst hk <;> tauto
      -- among these, only 546 is divisible by 14 with quotient < 50: gives n%50=39
      have : n % 50 = 39 := by
        rcases this with h46 | h146 | h246 | h346 | h446 | h546 | h646
        · have : 14 ∣ 46 := by exact ⟨n % 50, by simpa [h46]⟩
          exact False.elim (by decide : ¬(14 ∣ 46)) 
        · have : 14 ∣ 146 := by exact ⟨n % 50, by simpa [h146]⟩
          exact False.elim (by decide : ¬(14 ∣ 146))
        · have : 14 ∣ 246 := by exact ⟨n % 50, by simpa [h246]⟩
          exact False.elim (by decide : ¬(14 ∣ 246))
        · have : 14 ∣ 346 := by exact ⟨n % 50, by simpa [h346]⟩
          exact False.elim (by decide : ¬(14 ∣ 346))
        · have : 14 ∣ 446 := by exact ⟨n % 50, by simpa [h446]⟩
          exact False.elim (by decide : ¬(14 ∣ 446))
        ·
          have : 14 * (n % 50) = 546 := h546
          have : n % 50 = 39 := by
            -- 546 = 14*39
            have : 546 = 14 * 39 := by decide
            exact Nat.mul_left_cancel (by decide : 0 < 14) (by simpa [this] using this.symm)
          exact this
        · have : 14 ∣ 646 := by exact ⟨n % 50, by simpa [h646]⟩
          exact False.elim (by decide : ¬(14 ∣ 646))
      exact this
    · intro hn
      -- if n%50=39 then 14*n%100=46
      have : n ≡ 39 [MOD 50] := by simpa [Nat.ModEq] using hn
      have : 14 * n ≡ 14 * 39 [MOD 100] := by
        have h50 : 50 ∣ n - 39 := by
          simpa [Nat.ModEq] using this
        have : 100 ∣ 14 * (n - 39) := by
          -- 50 | (n-39) => 100 | 14*(n-39) since 100=2*50 and 14 is even
          rcases h50 with ⟨t, ht⟩
          refine ⟨7 * t, ?_⟩
          -- 14*(n-39)=14*(50*t)=700*t=100*(7*t)
          simp [ht, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm]
        have : (14 * n - 14 * 39) = 14 * (n - 39) := by
          ring_nf
        -- use modEq via divisibility of difference
        refine Nat.ModEq.of_dvd ?_ this
        simpa [this, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm]
      -- compute 14*39 % 100 = 46
      have : (14 * 39) % 100 = 46 := by decide
      -- transfer via ModEq
      exact (Nat.ModEq.eq_of_lt_of_lt (a:=14*n%100) (b:=46) (by exact Nat.mod_lt _ (by decide))
        (by decide)).1 (by
          -- show congruence of remainders
          have : 14 * n % 100 = (14 * 39) % 100 := by
            exact Nat.ModEq.modEq_iff_dvd.1 (by
              -- from congruence modulo 100
              simpa [Nat.ModEq] using this)
          simpa [this] )
  have hu_mod : u % 50 = 39 := (hmod u).1 hu_eq
  have hv_mod : v % 50 = 39 := (hmod v).1 hv_eq

  have hdesc : ∀ n : ℕ, n % 50 = 39 → n ∈ S := by
    intro n hn
    have : 14 * n % 100 = 46 := (hmod n).2 hn
    exact (h₀ n).2 ⟨by
      have : 39 ≤ n % 50 := by simpa [hn]
      have hpos : 0 < n % 50 := lt_of_lt_of_le (by decide : 0 < 39) (by simpa [hn])
      exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
        intro hz; simpa [hz] using hpos), this⟩
  have hu_min : u = 39 := by
    have hu_le_39 : u ≤ 39 := by
      have : 39 ∈ S := by
        have : 39 % 50 = 39 := by decide
        have hpos : 0 < 39 := by decide
        exact (h₀ 39).2 ⟨hpos, by decide⟩
      exact h₁.2 this
    have hu_ge_39 : 39 ≤ u := by
      have := Nat.le_of_lt hu_pos
      -- from u%50=39 implies u≥39
      have : u % 50 = 39 := hu_mod
      have : 39 ≤ u := by exact Nat.le_trans (by decide : 39 ≤ u % 50) (Nat.mod_le u 50)
      exact this
    exact le_antisymm hu_le_39 hu_ge_39
  have hv_min : v = 89 := by
    have hv_le_89 : v ≤ 89 := by
      have : 89 ∈ S \ {u} := by
        have hpos : 0 < 89 := by decide
        have : 14 * 89 % 100 = 46 := by decide
        have hS : 89 ∈ S := (h₀ 89).2 ⟨hpos, this⟩
        refine ⟨hS, ?_⟩
        simp [hu_min]
      exact h₂.2 this
    have hv_ge_89 : 89 ≤ v := by
      have h : v % 50 = 39 := hv_mod
      have hv_ge_39 : 39 ≤ v := by
        exact Nat.le_trans (by decide : 39 ≤ v % 50) (Nat.mod_le v 50)
      have hv_ne39 : v ≠ 39 := by simpa [hu_min] using hv_ne
      have hv_ge_89 : 89 ≤ v := by
        -- numbers ≡39 mod 50 are 39,89,139,...; with v>39 gives v≥89
        have : 50 ∣ v - 39 := by
          have : v ≡ 39 [MOD 50] := by simpa [Nat.ModEq] using h
          simpa [Nat.ModEq] using this
        rcases this with ⟨t, ht⟩
        have hv_gt : 0 < v - 39 := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
          intro hz
          have : v = 39 := by exact Nat.eq_of_sub_eq_zero hz
          exact hv_ne39 this)
        have htpos : 0 < t := by
          have : 50 * t = v - 39 := by simpa [ht, Nat.mul_comm] using rfl
          have : 0 < 50 * t := by simpa [this] using hv_gt
          exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
            intro htz
            simp [htz] at this)
        have ht1 : 1 ≤ t := Nat.succ_le_iff.1 htpos
        have : 39 + 50 ≤ v := by
          -- v = 39 + 50*t with t≥1
          have hv : v = 39 + 50 * t := by
            have : v = 39 + (v - 39) := by exact (Nat.add_sub_cancel_left 39 v).symm
            simp [this, ht, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.add_assoc]
          -- from t≥1
          have : 50 ≤ 50 * t := by
            simpa [Nat.mul_comm] using Nat.mul_le_mul_left 50 ht1
          -- add 39
          exact by
            simpa [hv, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using Nat.add_le_add_left this 39
        simpa using this
      exact hv_ge_89
    exact le_antisymm hv_le_89 hv_ge_89
  subst hu_min
  subst hv_min
  norm_num
